title: Drain Unblocker Wire Tools 5M x 5mm Drain Snake Sink Unblocker Tool Flexible Drain Auger Spring Plumbing Snake Drain Hair Remover for Kitchen Sink Washbasins Toilet Tub Shower Basins
features: Drain unblocker tool: Flexible drain unblocker tools well pass through curved pipes, cleaning debris and residue from sinks or drains. The work can be done in a few minutes saving a lot of time and money on hiring a plumber.

Safe and eco-friendly: Toilet snake is made of carbon steel wire and PE plastic handles, with good ductility, not easy to break, long service life. Great for unblocking pipes, no pollution to the environment. The perfect alternative to toxic chemical drain cleaners.

Unique design: Shower drain unblocker is with ergonomic handle, easy to hold and easy to operate, just turn the handle to pass through the bends; An open spiral tip at the end makes it easy to grab hairs and blockages, making cleaning easier.
Easy to use: Insert the wire of toilet auger slowly into the blocked pipe, turn the handle to pass through the bend until you reach the blockage and turn the handle clockwise to remove the blockage.

Powerful and practical: The overall length of the drain cleaner tool is 5m and the diameter is 5mm. It is an ecologically effective way to unblock most pipes inside and outside the home, such as shower drains, kitchen sinks, tubs, toilets, washbasin, floor drains and sewers.
description: Still struggling with clogged kitchen sinks and shower drains? Does hiring a plumber cost you a lot? Minnhua drain unblocker will help you! Easy to hold: Ergonomic plastic handle, confortable to hold and easy to operate. Spiral head: Easier to clean, no clogging Flexible: Spring uses high -quality carbon steel wire, good flexibility Spring with spiral design, turn the handle to pass through a variety of curved pipes, making it easy to grasp the blockage and remove it with ease. With a total length (include handle) of 5m, it has a longer length than other unblocking tool. For various shower drains, sewage canals and sink channel, like kitchen sinks, shower drains, washbasin, toilets. Specifications: Material: Carbon steel wire and PE plastic Color: Blue Size: 5m (include handle) Package includes: 1 x Drain unblocker tool
